title: bromus hordeaceus var. mollis
intro: Bromus hordeaceus var. mollis, also known as soft brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. Soft brome can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
